title: M1 MacBook Pro (Yahir's, 2021–2022)
html:
Stub. The 13" M1 MacBook Pro Yahir bought new in 2021 and tried to resell by spring 2022.

Disambiguation: not Ms. Mac (the middle school teacher).

What we know

  • Spec: Apple M1, 8-core CPU, 8-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine; 16 GB unified memory; 512 GB SSD; 13" Retina display; AppleCare till 2023.
  • Original purchase via the 2021 09 15 buy list (~$1968 retail).
  • Listed for resale in 2022 04 16 what are must have seasoning no salt or pepper — "selling due to need for a bigger screen."
  • The Singapore-laptop math in 2024 08 30 untitled (~$950–1100 budget) is the next chapter in Yahir's laptop-cycle history.
